docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY BROWN, ERNESTINE B SEYMORE, TAHJ M AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, TALA A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-12-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MONTOYA, TALA A
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BROWN, ERNESTINE B SEYMORE, TAHJ M MONTOYA, TALA A

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-03-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-03-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS ERNESTINE B BROWN AND THAJ M SEYMORE ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT TALA A MONTOYA IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, ERNESTINE B SEYMORE, TAHJ M IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MONTOYA, TALA A PLAINTIFF SEYMORE'S VEHICLEWAS NOT LAWFULLY PARKED UNDER SECTION 1004 OF THE SAN FRANCISCO TRANSPORTATION CODE. PLAINTIFF BROWN FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN RE CAUSATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
